message:
test(server): add JWKS stampede protection and concurrent refresh tests (br-1i11.4.2)

- Add helper with_counted_delayed_jwks_server() to mock JWKS endpoint with
  atomic request counting and configurable response delay
- Add test_jwks_material() and seed_expired_cache() for cache lifecycle setup

Test coverage:
- Single-fetch stampede protection: stale cache + 10 concurrent callers
  results in exactly 1 HTTP request; others get stale data immediately
- Fast stale serving: 8/10 concurrent callers complete in <250ms despite
  slow (500ms) refresh, proving non-blocking stale return
- Force refresh bypass: force=true parameter always hits remote endpoint
  even when cache contains fresh data
- Cold start behavior: multiple requests expected on first fetch when no
  fallback stale data exists
- Lock release after failure: CAS refresh flag properly cleared on HTTP
  errors or bad JSON, allowing subsequent retry

Verifies production resilience against JWKS refresh thundering herd during
key rotation events.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
